settings.headline: The Daily
settings.description: Complete meal powder engineered around microbiome diversity. 30+ plant sources. Prebiotic fibre. Postbiotic compounds. Akkermansia-supporting substrates. One serving, every day.

settings.headline: Built for the long game.
settings.subline: Subscribe once. Build the habit. Measure the change.

settings.title: Subscribe
settings.description: Choose your bag size. Subscribe monthly and save 15%. Cancel anytime — no friction, no lock-in.

settings.title: Build the Habit
settings.description: One serving per day. In water, oat milk, or a smoothie. Morning is optimal — feed your microbiome before the day starts.

settings.title: Measure the Change
settings.description: Most subscribers notice digestive changes within 14 days. The deeper shift — in energy, inflammation, and resilience — shows over months.

settings.headline: Every ingredient earns its place.
settings.intro: Formulated around the current consensus in microbiome science. No fillers. No proprietary blends that hide under-dosed actives. Full transparency, always.

settings.name: Akkermansia Substrates
settings.description: Polyphenol-rich substrates that selectively feed Akkermansia muciniphila — the gut bacteria most consistently linked to metabolic health and longevity.
settings.research_note: ↑ Mucus layer integrity · Metabolic signalling · Inflammatory regulation

settings.name: Prebiotic Fibre Blend
settings.description: A combination of inulin-type fructans and resistant starch from 30+ whole food plant sources. Fuel for the bacteria that fuel you.
settings.research_note: ↑ Microbial diversity · Short-chain fatty acid production

settings.name: Postbiotic Compounds
settings.description: Fermentation-derived bioactives that act directly on the immune system and gut epithelium — no live cultures required for efficacy.

settings.name: Plant Protein Matrix
settings.description: Complete amino acid profile from diverse plant sources. Not soy-dominant. Designed around absorption, not label claims.

settings.headline: We built this because the supplement industry wasn't honest with us.
settings.body_1: The longevity space is full of products that borrow the language of science without the substance. Underdosed actives. Proprietary blends. Claims that no regulation can touch.
settings.body_2: KULTIV is classified as a complete food — not a supplement. That means full label transparency, rigorous manufacturing standards, and a formulation stack built around what the microbiome research actually says.
